scenes.narration: Merit week is when pay problems show up — people below their range, managers earning less than their team, and budget surprises you did not plan for. ShiftWorks HR surfaces all of it from one roster upload in about a minute.
Pull your roster from Workday, ADP, or any spreadsheet. Drop it into ShiftWorks HR and you're ready to go — no IT project, no custom build.
Right away you see what needs attention before merit letters go out — who's flagged, how urgent it is, and where to start.
You also get the dollars — what it costs to fix underpaid employees, your merit pool, and total budget exposure. So when finance asks, you have an answer.
Every flag comes with names, departments, and exact dollar gaps — not just a row count buried in a spreadsheet.
Awkward manager situations get caught too — when someone earns less than the people they manage, you see both names and salaries side by side.
When leadership asks about pay equity, you already have gender and race pay gaps broken out — with real dollar differences, not a separate analysis.
Pay across locations is covered too — median salary by city or region, and how your workforce is spread geographically.
Need to brief executives? One click gives you a summary with risk level, total exposure, and the talking points they'll actually ask about.
Try it free at shiftworkshr.com with your own roster. No credit card required.
